privileged_info_summary: The task data is synthetically generated by setup_task.sh and not from external sources. Verified facts: The facility is Harborview Culinary Group, LLC (not 'Harborview Culinary Group' as claimed in metadata), located at 2100 Whetstone Way, Suite B, Baltimore, MD 21230, with 6,800 sq ft size. Food Safety Director is Elena Marchetti. The task requires incorporating 5 Critical Control Points with temperature requirements: 165°F (poultry cooking), 135°F (hot holding/cooling), and 41°F (cold storage), all present in the synthetic data. The five CCPs are: CCP-1 Receiving (≤41°F), CCP-2 Cooking (≥165°F for poultry), CCP-3 Cooling (135°F to 70°F in 2h, then to 41°F in 4h), CCP-4 Hot Holding (≥135°F), and CCP-5 Cold Transport (≤41°F). The metadata contains a minor error: the company name should include ', LLC'.
